name: Pharma-Bio Serv, Inc.
summary: Pharma-Bio Serv, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated regulatory affairs, quality, compliance, and technology transfer consulting firm headquartered in Puerto Rico. It serves pharmaceutical, chemical, biotechnology, medical device, cosmetic, and food industries in Puerto Rico, the United States, Europe, and Brazil. Services include regulatory compliance, validation, technology transfer, engineering, and project management. Revenue is derived approximately 99% from time-and-materials contracts and 1% from fixed-fee contracts, serving approximately 70 customers annually.

products.name: Regulatory Compliance Consulting
products.description: Consulting services to ensure regulatory compliance for pharmaceutical, biotech, medical device, and chemical industries.

products.name: Validation Services
products.description: Technical validation consulting for manufacturing and laboratory processes across life science industries.

products.name: Technology Transfer Services
products.description: Support for transferring manufacturing processes and technologies between sites or organizations.

products.name: Engineering and Project Management
products.description: Engineering support and project management services for pharmaceutical and allied industries.
